get.summary: Gets all Academic Organization data
Gets Academic Organization data for a specific entry by the Organization code

parameters.name: organizationCode
parameters.description: Unique Academic Organization code

post.summary: Use this method to request an API key and begin your registration process

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: A unique email that we can use to identify you and contact you. We will ask to confirm it.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: A name and description of your project

parameters.name: uri
parameters.description: The web address of your project: it's live location, app store entry, or similar

get.summary: Use this method to see if an email has already been registered for an API key

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address to check

get.summary: Use this method to have us re-send the confirmation email to an account pending confirmation, if it exists. The activation code will be reset in the process.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address to re-send confirmation email to

get.summary: User this method to put your account in pending confirmation status and generate a new API key. Your old key will no longer grant access. The account will need to be confirmed again before the new key grants access.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address of associated account to reset

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: Current API account key

post.summary: Use this method to confirm your email and activate your account

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address you used to register

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Activation code we sent you in the confirmation email

get.summary: Retrieves data for all paid holidays as published by Human Resources
Retrieves data for paid holidays associated to the given year as published by Human Resources
Retrieves data for all paid holidays as published by Human Resources, as an ICS format feed. Allows anonymous access.

Returns important date data related to academic year

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Academic year to filter on

parameters.description: Number of items to retrieve, default 15, maximum 25

parameters.description: Unique Id for the Site

parameters.description: (Optional) Maximum amount of items to retrieve

parameters.name: newestFirst
parameters.description: (Optional) Requires maxItems parameter, sorts items by created date, newest first

code.description: Unique Code of this Academic Organization

name.description: The Name for this Academic Organization, most often the display name

description.description: The short description for this Academic Organization

descriptionFormal.description: The formal description for this Academic Organization, most often used in official capacity

associatedCampusCode.description: The Code for the Campus that this Academic Organization is assigned to

AcademicOrganization.description: An Academic Organization at Waterloo is similar to a department

courseOfferNumber.description: Course offer number identifier for this class

classSection.description: Number identifying the section of this class

classNumber.description: Class number identifier for this class

courseComponent.description: Course component code for this class

associatedClassCode.description: Associated class code for this class

maxEnrollmentCapacity.description: Indicates the maximum number of students that can enroll in this class

enrolledStudents.description: Indicates the current number of students enrolled in this class

enrollConsentCode.description: Code describing whether No, Instructor, or Department consent to enroll is required. Overrides Course level information if different.

enrollConsentDescription.description: Description of the enroll requirement. Overrides Course level information if different.

dropConsentCode.description: Code describing whether No, Instructor, or Department consent to drop is required. Overrides Course level information if different.

dropConsentDescription.description: Description of the drop requirement. Overrides Course level information if different.

Class.description: Represents an Academic class, which is a scheduled instance of a Course

courseOfferNumber.description: Course offer number identifier for this class

sessionCode.description: Session code number for this class

classSection.description: Number identifying the section of this class

instructorRoleCode.description: REMOVED for privacy. The code designation for the instructor's role in this class

instructorFirstName.description: REMOVED for privacy. The Instructors preferred first name

instructorLastName.description: REMOVED for privacy. The Instructors preferred last name

instructorUniqueIdentifier.description: REMOVED for privacy. A unique identifier that persists through name changes. Not guaranteed, but likely to be immutable for instructor.

classMeetingNumber.description: Identifier for the class meeting this instructor is for

courseOfferNumber.description: Course offer number identifier for this class

sessionCode.description: Session code number for this class

classSection.description: Number identifying the section of this class

classMeetingNumber.description: Identifier for the class meeting this schedule data relates to

classMeetingStartTime.description: The start time of this class

classMeetingEndTime.description: The end time of this class

classMeetingDayPatternCode.description: A code representing the days the class schedule takes place during the week

classMeetingWeekPatternCode.description: A Y|N per day representation of the class schedule taking place during the week

locationName.description: REMOVED for privacy. Building and room name for the location of this class schedule

ClassSchedule.description: Data describing scheduling and availability data for a Class

courseId.description: Course Id that identifies this Course, not unique across terms

courseOfferNumber.description: Course Offer Number identifies cross-listed and similar Courses that shared a Course Id in a Term

termCode.description: Waterloo Term code for which this Course data applies

termName.description: Waterloo Term name for which this Course data applies

associatedAcademicCareer.description: Academic Career code associated with Course

associatedAcademicGroupCode.description: The Academic Group code that is assocaited to this Course

associatedAcademicOrgCode.description: The Academic Organization code that is associated to this Course

subjectCode.description: The Subject code for this Course

catalogNumber.description: The Catalog Number for this Course

title.description: Course title, full name of course

descriptionAbbreviated.description: Short description of the course, often an abbreviation of the title

description.description: Description of the Course content and topics

gradingBasis.description: Code to describe the grading basis for this course, can be overriden at Class level

courseComponentCode.description: Course Component Code that describes if the course is a lecture, tutorial, etc.

enrollConsentCode.description: Code describing whether No, Instructor, or Department consent to enroll is required. Can be overwridden at Class level.

enrollConsentDescription.description: Description of the enroll requirement. Can be overwridden at Class level.

dropConsentCode.description: Code describing whether No, Instructor, or Department consent to drop is required. Can be overwridden at Class level.

dropConsentDescription.description: Description of the drop requirement. Can be overwridden at Class level.

requirementsDescription.description: Description of the Course requirements, such as pre-requisites, anti-requisites, and co-requisites

Course.description: An academic Course at Waterloo, a Course can be scheduled to become a Class

examDisplayName.description: The name of the Exam, representative of the Course name

sections.description: Sections of the Class this Exam schedule is applicable to

isOnlineDescription.description: Indicates whether this Exam is held online, or provides an alternate description

day.description: Day name on which this Exam is scheduled to take place

location.description: Description of the location of the Exam

examWindowStartDate.description: The date the Exam is scheduled for

examWindowStartTime.description: The time the Exam is scheduled to start

examDuration.description: The scheduled duration of the Exam

notes.description: Additional notes about this Exam schedule

termCode.description: Term Code for the Term this Exam is associated with

Exam.description: Represents a scheduled Exam for a Class

coordinates.description: Latitude and Longitude collection of this location

Geometry.description: Represents Geometry data of the Feature

id.description: Unique, non-persistent Api Id for this resource

description.description: Optional description of the Important Date, can contain markup

importantDateType.description: The type category this Important Date belongs to

associatedAcademicYear.description: The academic year this important date is associated to

details.description: Details about terms, dates, and special notes

keywords.description: Keywords associated with the Important Date

audiences.description: Audiences associated with the Important Date

ImportantDate.description: An Important Date is an event at a time that has significance to the Waterloo community

importantDateId.description: Id link to associated Important Date, internal

termName.description: Name of the associated Term when the Important Date takes place

startDate.description: Start or event date for the Important Date

endDate.description: Optional end date for the Important Date

notes.description: Any special notes for this occurance of the Important Date, can contain markup

ImportantDateDetails.description: Details about terms, dates, and special notes for an Important Date

parentBuildingCode.description: Unofficial, alpha-numeric building code that represents the parent location

alternateBuildingNames.description: Unofficial, collection of alternate building display names

Location.description: Model representing a Location for the Buildings dataset

type.description: Type property of GEO JSON collection

LocationGeo.description: Model representing a Location for the Buildings dataset in GEO JSON format

holidayDate.description: Date of the paid holiday event

PaidHoliday.description: Data object representing a University of Waterloo paid holiday

relativeUri.description: Relative URI of the site from the root uWaterloo CMS domain

completeUri.description: Complete URI of the site, including root domain

ownerUnitCode.description: If available, the department owner code for this Site. Can loosely map to Academic Groups.

ownerUnitNameShort.description: Short name of the department owner for this Site. See OwnerUnitCode for more.

ownerUnitNameFull.description: Full name of the department owner for this Site. See OwnerUnitCode for more.

ownerGroupCode.description: If available, the faculty owner code for this Site. Can loosely map to Academic Organization.

ownerType.description: The tag describing the association of the owner department, such as academic, research, and more.

Site.description: Model representing a Site on the Waterloo CMS

uniqueKey.description: Unique Id of this post item

itemUri.description: URI to the item in WCMS

content.description: Blog post content, often with HTML markup

delegatedAuthorName.description: Display name of the delegated author for this blog post

delegatedAuthorUri.description: Link to the WCMS profiel of the delegated author

publisherUsername.description: Username of the person publishing the content, not necessarily the author

SiteBlogPost.description: Model representing a WCMS blog post item

uniqueKey.description: Unique Id of this evevnt item

recurRule.description: Description of the event recurrence rule

eventTimezone.description: Time zone description of the event dates

audience.description: Tag(s) representing the intended audience for the event

locationId.description: Unique Id of the location hosting the event

locationName.description: Display name of the location hosting the event

content.description: Description content for the event, often includes HTML markup

SiteEvent.description: Model representing a WCMS Event item

siteId.description: Unique, numeric site ID of the Site this news originates from

uniqueKey.description: Unique Id of this news item

itemUri.description: URI to the news item in WCMS

content.description: News item content, often with HTML markup

SiteNews.description: Model representing News data associated to a Site in the WCMS

name.description: The Name for this Subject, most often the displayed name

descriptionAbbreviated.description: The short description of this subject, often same as Code

associatedAcademicOrgCode.description: Code for the Academic Organization that is associated to this Subject

Subject.description: An academic Subject at Waterloo describes an area that a Course can be in

name.description: The Name for this Term, most often the displayed name

nameShort.description: The short form name for this Term

termBeginDate.description: The date and time from which the Term begins, inclusive

termEndDate.description: The date and time on which the Term ends, inclusive

sixtyPercentCompleteDate.description: The date and time at which the term is 60% complete, used for standing, withdrawal, and penalties

associatedAcademicYear.description: The academic year to which this Term belongs

Term.description: An academic Term at Waterloo, a defined period of time that is used by classes and similar
